__fixture__.name: remote_connector_disconnect_offline
__fixture__.scenario: An SSH remote connector loses its transport past the offline threshold (disconnect_duration_seconds.offline_at = 15). The supervisor drops the remote session and projects escalation_state_after = offline. Local editing and cached reads remain available; remote task launches surface an offline chip with the local-safe alternative and the reconnect owner. The forensic packet records the transport-disconnect-past-budget stall reason.

heartbeat_snapshot.note: Connector missed three heartbeats across 30 seconds; underlying transport confirmed disconnected.

resource_snapshot.note: Provider-overlay lane is holding remote-bound traffic while the connector is disconnected.

capability_envelope_snapshot.note: Remote mount subscription, SSH session, and credential alias were in use at disconnect.

contract_versions.note: Remote proxy bridge contract is current.

last_good_checkpoint.note: Remote mount metadata snapshot preserved; reconnect starts from this epoch and emits warming.

degraded_state_lineage.note: First heartbeat miss; RTT and error rate entered the degraded band.
Disconnect duration crossed offline_at; supervisor projects offline and pauses active provider-overlay work.

revoked_tickets.note: SSH session torn down; reconnect will establish a new session id.
Credential alias invalidated on transport loss; broker re-issues on reconnect after policy admission.
Remote mount subscription revoked; consumers receive resync_required with host_restart reason.
Remote capability envelope revoked; reachability and capability posture re-negotiate on reconnect.

emergency_action_linkage.note: No emergency action; routine transport disconnect.

workspace_scope.note: Connector runs at the workspace scope; execution contexts bound to this connector are now unreachable and surface offline.

summary: Remote connector lost its SSH transport past the offline threshold; supervisor dropped the session, revoked transport and credential handles, preserved the mount-state checkpoint, and projected offline while local editing and cached reads remain unaffected.
